Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Nova Scotia and Newfoundland and Labrador Additional Fiscal Equalization Offset Payments Act
Identification.ShortTitle: An Act to amend the Nova Scotia and Newfoundland and Labrador Additional Fiscal Equalization Offset Payments Act
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Nova Scotia and Newfoundland and Labrador Additional Fiscal Equalization Offset Payments Act
Identification.BillSponsor: DEPUTY PRIME MINISTER AND MINISTER OF FINANCE

Provision.Text: His Excellency the Administrator of the Government of Canada recommends to the House of Commons the appropriation of public revenue under the circumstances, in the manner and for the purposes set out in a measure entitled âAn Act to amend the Nova Scotia and Newfoundland and Labrador Additional Fiscal Equalization Offset Payments Actâ.

This enactment amends the Nova Scotia and Newfoundland and Labrador Additional Fiscal Equalization Offset Payments Act to authorize the Minister of Finance to make an additional fiscal equalization offset payment to Nova Scotia for the 2020-2021 fiscal year and to extend that Ministerâs authority to make additional fiscal equalization offset payments to Nova Scotia until March 31, 2023.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Heading.TitleText: Nova Scotia and Newfoundland and Labrador Additional Fiscal Equalization Offset Payments Act

Section.Text: Section 12 of the Nova Scotia and Newfoundland and Labrador Additional Fiscal Equalization Offset Payments Act is amended by adding the following after subsection (2):

Subsection.MarginalNote: Additional fiscal equalization offset payment for 2020-2021
Subsection.Text: For the 2020-2021 fiscal year, the Minister shall make an additional fiscal equalization offset payment to the Province in the amount of $85,626,000.

Subsection.MarginalNote: Extension of CanadaâNova Scotia Arrangement for 2021-2023
Subsection.Text: For any fiscal year between April 1, 2021 and March 31, 2023, the Minister shall make additional fiscal equalization offset payments to the Province, determined in accordance with the formula set out in section 8, if the Province receives a fiscal equalization payment for that fiscal year.

ExplanatoryNote.TitleText: Nova Scotia and Newfoundland and Labrador Additional Fiscal Equalization Offset Payments Act
ExplanatoryNote.Label: Clause 1:
